Common.appTagline: Structured review for focused study groups.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The requested page could not be found in the current locale space.

Auth.title: Sign in to continue your review sessions.
Auth.description: Use email, password, magic link, or Google to access your ActiveBoard workspace.
Auth.highlightTimer: Run each question with a clear shared timer.
Auth.highlightInvites: Create a group and invite members directly in the app.
Auth.highlightReview: Review answers with a clean A/B/C/D/E/[ ] distribution.
Auth.switchToSignIn: Already have an account? Sign in
Auth.magicLinkSent: Magic link sent. Check your inbox.
Auth.signUpSuccess: Account created. Check your inbox to confirm if required.
Auth.invalidCredentials: The sign-in details are invalid or incomplete.
Auth.googleError: Google sign-in could not be started.
Auth.unexpectedError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Dashboard.title: Your study groups and live invitations.
Dashboard.description: Create a group, join one with a code, or accept an invitation from a captain directly in the app.
Dashboard.emptyGroups: No groups yet. Create one or join with a code to get started.

Group.sessionEmpty: No sessions yet. Schedule the first one for your group.
Group.inviteEmpty: No invitations have been sent from this group yet.

Session.title: Session room
Session.questionPlaceholder: Paste or type the question prompt here.
Session.sessionNotStarted: Start the session to begin asking timed questions.
Session.reviewHint: Once the answer is revealed, the structured review shows the exact distribution across A/B/C/D/E and blank.

Feedback.notAuthorized: You do not have access to this resource.
Feedback.inviteExists: A pending invitation already exists for this email.
Feedback.actionFailed: The action could not be completed. Please try again.
Feedback.questionActive: Finish the current question before launching a new one.
Feedback.questionClosed: This question is no longer accepting answers.
Feedback.answerWindowClosed: The answer timer has expired for this question.
